reasoning: The Lean signature asserts IsConnected (Set.univ : Set (CofiniteTopology X)) under the typeclass [Infinite X]. In Mathlib, CofiniteTopology X is precisely the type synonym carrying the finite complement topology (open sets are ∅ or those with finite complement; see Topology/Constructions.lean). [Infinite X] corresponds exactly to "X is an infinite set". IsConnected (univ) is equivalent to the whole space being connected (Mathlib provides connectedSpace_iff_univ). Thus the Lean statement captures exactly the informal claim: for an infinite X, the whole space in the cofinite topology is connected. No hypotheses or conclusions are changed.
